name: [BUG-DB-009] TC-DB-009 — revenue-trend labels[] contains duplicate month names (no year)
description:
**[BUG-DB-009]**

The `/dashboard/revenue-trend` `data.labels[]` array contains duplicate month names like `["Jan","Feb",...,"Dec","Jan","Feb","Mar",...]` because the 12-month rolling window spans two calendar years but the labels only show month names without the year.

**Example:** If today is June 2026, the trend covers July 2025 – June 2026, giving two "Jun" entries (Jun 2025 at the end of the old year, Jun 2026 at the current end).

**Expected:** Labels should include the year: `"Jun 2025"`, `"Jun 2026"`.

**Impact:** Chart libraries that use labels as keys will de-duplicate them, causing data points to overlap. A chart showing 12 months will appear to show fewer data points.
descriptionHtml:
[BUG-DB-009]

The /dashboard/revenue-trend data.labels[] array contains duplicate month names like ["Jan","Feb",...,"Dec","Jan","Feb","Mar",...] because the 12-month rolling window spans two calendar years but the labels only show month names without the year.

Example: If today is June 2026, the trend covers July 2025 – June 2026, giving two "Jun" entries (Jun 2025 at the end of the old year, Jun 2026 at the current end).

Expected: Labels should include the year: "Jun 2025", "Jun 2026".

Impact: Chart libraries that use labels as keys will de-duplicate them, causing data points to overlap. A chart showing 12 months will appear to show fewer data points.
